headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall; Stock Market Slashes Losses, Oil Pares Gains As Trump Says This

headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall On Trump Tariff Hike After Rising On Iran Outreach Report

headline: Why Is Ross Stores (ROST) Stock Soaring Today
summary: Shares of off-price retail company Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) jumped 7.1% in the afternoon session after the company reported fourth-quarter financial results that surpassed Wall Street's expectations.

content.title: Why Is Ross Stores (ROST) Stock Soaring Today
content.summary: Shares of off-price retail company Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) jumped 7.1% in the afternoon session after the company reported fourth-quarter financial results that surpassed Wall Street's expectations.
